elements.original_description: A stack of coins rapidly grows taller on a pure white background, with dollar signs swirling around it energetically. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A dynamic, high-quality 2D flat vector illustration on a pure white background. The central subject is a tall, rapidly growing stack of golden coins, clean and minimalist with sharp edges. Energetic dollar signs swirl around the stack in a lively, circular motion, depicted as simple, high-contrast 2D icons. The style is professional, clean flat vector art with no shading, gradients, or textures. The mood is energetic and fast-paced, reflecting rapid growth. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks present.
